calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Atty Fees After Judgment; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Dec-19-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION'S Motion For Atty Fees After JudgmenT IS Off calendar as untimely under CCP 1005(b). The motion was filed and served on November 25, 2013. Moving party did not account for two additional calendar days for service by express mail. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Court Reporter: Tony Vaughn, CSR #6185

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Oct-04-2013 Vacated

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Sep-18-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
John H. Wunsch, Esq. of the Office of General Counsel, Wells Fargo & Co., Tel. 626.965.9465, for plaintiff and moving party, by Court Call;
No other appearance.

RULING: The Court adopted the tentative ruling which was not contested. PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is granted. Pursuant to CCP 437, plaintiff has met its burden by establishing each element of every cause of action. Burden then shifted to defendant to show a defense or triable issue of material fact exists. No opposition filed. Order and Judgment signed. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185
